features: LUXURY PACK: Indulge in a pack of 6 delicate body washes, featuring the gentle fragrance of royale garden verbena and chamomile
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Formulated to be vegan friendly, ensuring ethical and sustainable toiletry use
REUSABLE BOTTLES: Packaged in reusable bottles for an eco-conscious bathing routine that's also luxurious
TOILETRIES SET: This luxury set is ideal as a gift or for pampering yourself with premium quality ingredients
DELICATE FRAGRANCE: Enjoy the soothing scents of verbena and chamomile while cleansing your skin with this luxurious body wash collection
description: Product Description Aromatically infused this perfect blend of light, fruity, citrus tones balanced with sweet and delicate bursts of chamomile will leave your skin and body feeling reinvigorated, refreshed and beautifully cleansed. Take a stroll through an English garden with out assortment of country classics. Timeless toiletries combine with stunning illustrations and sensational scents that celebrate the best of the natural world. Florals, fruits and feminine motifs provide the perfect products for house-proud self purchase or effortless gifting. Ingredients Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Peg-4 Rapeseedamide, Sodium Benzoate, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Glycol Distearate, Laureth-4, Citric Acid, Tetrasodium Edta, Sodium Hydroxide, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Benzyl Salicylate. Directions Lather and Rinse Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR See more
